sources.name: VulDB CTI API
sources.notes: Free limited key at vuldb.com/?api — requires authentication; will fail without valid key

sources.name: Philips Product Security Advisories (Historical Backfill)
sources.notes: Full Philips PSIRT archive via HTML scraping of yearly pages (2017-present). ~200 advisories. All healthcare-relevant.

sources.name: Siemens ProductCERT Advisories (CSAF Feed)
sources.notes: Siemens ProductCERT CSAF v2.0 advisories. Covers Siemens industrial products (SIMATIC, SCALANCE, etc.) widely deployed in healthcare infrastructure. Siemens Healthineers operates separately (~4 public advisories).

sources.name: FDA Device Enforcement / Safety Communications (Historical Backfill)
sources.notes: Full openFDA device enforcement archive via paginated API. 38K+ records (formal actions behind FDA safety communications). Filtered for cybersecurity relevance. Use fda_safety_comms_backfill.py to populate cache.

sources.name: openFDA Device Recalls (Historical Backfill)
sources.notes: Full openFDA device recall archive via paginated API. 60K+ recalls, filtered for cybersecurity relevance. Use openfda_backfill.py to populate cache.

sources.name: CISA ICS Medical Advisories (Historical Backfill)
sources.notes: Full ICSMA archive via ICS Advisory Project CSV + cisagov/CSAF JSON. ~182 advisories back to 2016. Use cisa_icsma_backfill.py to populate cache.

sources.name: NVD CVE Database (Historical Backfill)
sources.notes: Full NVD backfill via paginated API. Use nvd_backfill.py to populate cache, then discover reads from cache. 240K+ CVEs.
